title: Tiger Legacy
subTitle: The filmmaker captures the intimate lives of four female tigers and their cubs in Tadoba, India, over seven years, offering a rare look at their behaviors in their natural habitat.

title: Tiger Legacy
subTitle: Matkasur forces Maya's cubs to go into hiding as he forces himself within her territory. Later, Maya shows the way tigers hunt and preys on a deer after discovering her cubs.

title: The Lions Rule
subTitle: The filmmaker captures the daily activities of animals living in the hot climate of Glade, where the arrival of buffaloes to drink water turns into a feast for predators.

title: The Lions Rule
subTitle: During the dry season in Ruaha state,a herd of elephants visit the water body at Glade to extract the cleanest water using their trunk.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims and some large punture wounds.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: The host, a biologist who is an extreme angler, explores freshwater mysteries and local folklore, to debunk fascinating myths and track down harrowing tales.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, takes on the biggest investigation of his career; to unravel what happened to over a thousand passengers of the RMS Laconia, torpedoed in the mid-Atlantic in WWII.

title: Great Parks of Africa
subTitle: Table Mountain National Park in South Africa is home to a diverse range of plants and animals that belong to the rich ocean and the windswept coast.

title: Wild Spain - A tale of two brothers
subTitle: Wild Spain - A tale of two brothers

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Venturing into Australia's wild reveals nature's beauty and challenges.

title: Tiger Legacy
subTitle: Maya's new cubs grow into tree climbers. Soon, Maya kills a buck and Matkasur gets into a fierce fight with a mother sloth.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumored to have been eaten alive. Jeremy Wade retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and uncovers what was behind the Amazon Apocalypse.

title: Wildest Survival
subTitle: Primates like owls, hyenas with super senses and insects that show bioluminescence have evolved to succeed in a world without light.

title: Leopard Dynasty: The Rise of Rana
subTitle: In India's Jhalana Reserve, strength, strategy and survival collide in a wild power struggle. Ageing leopard Bahadur rules until his son, Rana, challenges his dominance. As father and son clash, alliances form, and a new chapter begins.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees that is home to a troop of baboons. However, there are dangers here, as the resident leopard is powerful and agile enough to climb trees.

title: Deadliest South Africa
subTitle: Kurdt Greenwood is on a quest is to seek out South Africa's most deadly snakes in order to educate and inspire people to see the value of these misunderstood creatures.

title: Nature's Ultimate Survivors
subTitle: Take a look at the survival skills of some of the toughest animals, from foxes to fish and enormous mammals fighting for their breeding rights.

title: Sibella: The Miracle Cheetah
subTitle: Sibella, a wild cheetah in South Africa, has a near-death experience. Later, after being rescued and brought to Samara, she rises to become one of the most skilled hunters.

title: The Incredible Five - A Cheetah's Tale
subTitle: The filmmaker sheds light upon a surprisingly different side of cheetah's, also known as the high-speed hunters of the Savannah while exploring the life of the male cheetah's living in small groups.

subTitle: The filmmaker sheds light on the life of a lion and cheetah family as they struggle to survive amidst climate change in Serengeti.

subTitle: The filmmaker sheds light on the attack instinct displayed by apex predators of the wild and provides insights into their deadly behaviour.

subTitle: Four groups of Chacma baboons compete with one another over food and territorial powers, on the border of Zimbabwe and Zambia.

subTitle: Survivors and experts share tales of Australia's deadly beaches and dangerous waters.

title: Pride Rules
subTitle: Wild life experts offer detailed insights into how the social hierarchy in a pride of lions comes into effect under different circumstances.

subTitle: Summer on Vancouver Island does not last long. The marmots in the mountains prepare for the cold season and the Canadian coastal wolves feast on a sperm whale.
